Errors TypeError: Cannot read properties of null

TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading preferences)

ERROR
23 occurrences First: 2h ago Last: 3min ago Affects: /api/users/:id

Stack Trace

TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'preferences')
at getUserPreferences /src/services/user.service.ts :42:24
at Object.handleRequest /src/controllers/api.controller.ts :118:9
at processTicksAndRejections node:internal/process/task_queues :95:5
... 8 internal frames
at Server.listen /src/index.ts :14:3
AI Diagnostic Report
Confidence: High

This error occurs when the code tries to access the preferences property on a null object.

Root Cause:

The database query in user.service.ts returned null because the provided user ID does not exist or has been deleted, but the service attempted to access its properties without validation.

Suggested Fix:

// Use optional chaining or null check
const prefs = user?.preferences ?? defaultPrefs;
